default.value: Priority 1-4 completed: Backend API fixed, frontend integration with modern UI cards completed, job saving implemented, Space tab integration done, improved zoom/pan functionality with smooth scrolling. Current UI completely redesigned with modern card-based approach. Ready for Priority 5-6 coordination.

Major UI overhaul completed: Replaced tiny circular nodes with large readable cards (120-180px), implemented modern color scheme (purple for anchors, blue for occupations, green for skills), added smooth zoom with 0.03 increments, improved connections with glow effects, larger spacing to prevent overlap, professional shadows and tooltips.

✅ COMPLETED: Backend graph_traversal_service import fix, enhanced skill tree generation, job saving API (/jobs/*), frontend integration (competenceTreeService.ts, NodeDetailModal.tsx, CompetenceTreeView.tsx), Space tab integration (SavedJobsList.tsx, SavedJobDetail.tsx), modern UI with card design, smooth zoom/pan controls.

🎉 MAJOR MILESTONE: Priorities 1-4 COMPLETED! Interactive competence tree with modern UI is production-ready. Backend fixed (graph_traversal import resolved), job saving functional, Space tab integration complete, beautiful card-based design implemented. Next agent: Focus on Priority 5 (Educational pathways) - program matching service needed. All documentation updated in /task/interactiveTree/
